metadata.name: Update Employee Bank Details for Payroll

description: An employee has requested to change the bank account where their pay is deposited.

nodes.task_description: Receive the employee's request and new bank account details via a secure form.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent receives the new routing and account numbers.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the employee's identity to prevent fraud.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully verifies the employee's identity through a two-factor authentication process.

nodes.task_description: Update the employee's direct deposit information in the payroll system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the banking details.
